grounding.cb3_locus: fused RHT+dim-2-VQ sub-int4 body decode kernel; #437 ij0gvd1i idealized counterfactual penalty 1.1593 -> 521.82 re-priced with a realistic gather-derate (gamma) + FWHT-tax (phi).

probe.note: torch global-mem gather UPPER-bounds the fused tax (no in-register reuse); this is a conservative FLOOR on gamma, not the literature-anchored headline.

verdict: #437's IDEALIZED fused counterfactual (penalty 1.1593 -> frontier 521.82) grants cb3 its compressed byte stream at peak-copy BW + Marlin overhead, with the in-GEMM codebook GATHER and the online FWHT assumed FREE. Charging them HONESTLY (gamma=0.85 gather-derate, phi=0.025 FWHT-tax, literature-anchored to Ampere fused-VQ kernels FLUTE/AQLM/QuIP#) collapses the penalty to 1.0246 and the frontier to 475.86 -- a marginal lift vs int4-Marlin. Prize over the 467.14 base = +8.72; vs the deployed 481.53 = -5.67 (BELOW). The gather tax (random LDS lookup per dequant element, int4's branchless unpack is ~free) eats most/all of the 0.785x byte saving -- the exact bandwidth-surrogate optimism #433 (pinned-K) and #437 (materialize) already exposed. Bracket: conservative 448.7 / central 475.9 / optimistic 501.4; the deployed 481.53 sits ABOVE the central estimate. An independent floor-model cross-check (multiplicative composition, cb3 at Marlin's REALIZED eff not peak-copy) CONVERGES on 476.0 (penalty 1.0249), corroborating the per-shape headline 475.9 from a second decomposition; both BELOW 481.53. The on-pod L1-gather micro-probe floor is even harsher (gamma~0.66, a global-mem upper-bound on the tax), so 481.53 clears the central comfortably. recommend_build=False: a multi-week custom sm_86 VQ-GEMM build is NOT justified for a sub-sigma prize. ppl anchored 2.3772 (ubel #422).
go_no_go_line: a fused RHT+VQ sub-int4 sm_86 decode kernel is achievable on Ampere primitives, would realize ~475.9 TPS (prize +8.7 over the 467.14 realized base, below the deployed 481.53 by -5.7), at an estimated build effort of HIGH (~12-20 expert-CUDA person-weeks: a correct + autotuned + vLLM-0.22-integrable fused RHT+VQ mma.sync m16n8k16 decode kernel with a shared-mem codebook gather; 12wk floor from a working Marlin/FLUTE base, 20wk incl. autotune sweep + vLLM custom-op integration + the greedy-identity + PPL + 128/128 re-validation it triggers) -- NOT worth greenlighting (materiality bar = clear 481.53 by > sigma_hw 1.0% = 486.3).
build_effort_estimate: HIGH (~12-20 expert-CUDA person-weeks: a correct + autotuned + vLLM-0.22-integrable fused RHT+VQ mma.sync m16n8k16 decode kernel with a shared-mem codebook gather; 12wk floor from a working Marlin/FLUTE base, 20wk incl. autotune sweep + vLLM custom-op integration + the greedy-identity + PPL + 128/128 re-validation it triggers)

config.build_effort_estimate: HIGH (~12-20 expert-CUDA person-weeks: a correct + autotuned + vLLM-0.22-integrable fused RHT+VQ mma.sync m16n8k16 decode kernel with a shared-mem codebook gather; 12wk floor from a working Marlin/FLUTE base, 20wk incl. autotune sweep + vLLM custom-op integration + the greedy-identity + PPL + 128/128 re-validation it triggers)
config.lit_gamma_anchor: FLUTE arXiv:2407.10960 Tab1 (parity, gamma~1 ceiling); QuIP# arXiv:2402.04396 Tab5 (>50% HBM, gamma~0.78 floor); AQLM arXiv:2401.06118 (L1-overflow gamma~0.19, AVOIDED dim-2/1KB)
config.lit_phi_anchor: HadaCore arXiv:2412.08832 (online FWHT ~10% unfused / 2-5% fused, amortized 4x across q,k,v,o)
config.lit_constructible: FLUTE (github.com/HanGuo97/flute), AQLM (RTX3090 sm_86), QuIP# (A6000 sm_86) -- all cp.async + mma.sync, no Hopper wgmma/TMA
